Test Description: Configure PA0 as output and verify GPIOA_ODR readback after writing high and low.
Remarks: Requires GPIOA clock enabled and PA0 available as output on target platform.
Test Steps / Procedure: 1) Enable GPIOA clock. 2) Configure PA0 as output. 3) Write 1 to GPIOA_ODR bit 0. 4) Read back GPIOA_ODR bit 0 and verify it is 1. 5) Write 0 to GPIOA_ODR bit 0. 6) Read back GPIOA_ODR bit 0 and verify it is 0.
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Pass if GPIOA_ODR bit 0 reads 1 after set and 0 after clear; otherwise fail.
Gap Analysis: Hardcoded use of PA0; no verification of actual pad state (only ODR readback); no timeout or recovery handling.

Feature: Falling-edge trigger enable on alternate pads
Test Description: Enable falling-edge trigger on EXTI lines 0, 2, 4, and 6 and verify configuration.
Remarks: Assumes EXTI lines 0,2,4,6 are available and mapped to valid pads on the target.
Test Steps / Procedure: 1) Select pins {0,2,4,6}. 2) Set EXTI_FTSR bit for each selected pin. 3) Read back EXTI_FTSR for each pin. 4) Verify each configured bit is set. 5) Declare pass when all bits are set.
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: For each pin in {0,2,4,6}, EXTI_FTSR & (1<<pin) must be non-zero; otherwise fail.
Gap Analysis: Interrupt mask and GPIO-to-EXTI mapping not configured; no runtime stimulus to confirm actual interrupt behavior; hardcoded pin list.

Test Description: Configure PA1 as input, map PA1 to EXTI1, enable falling-edge interrupt and verify configuration.
Remarks: Requires GPIO and SYSCFG clocks enabled; PA1 must be present and connectable to EXTI1.
Test Steps / Procedure: 1) Enable GPIO and SYSCFG clocks. 2) Configure PA1 as input. 3) Map PA1 to EXTI1 via system configuration. 4) Enable EXTI1 interrupt mask. 5) Enable falling-edge trigger for EXTI1. 6) Verify EXTI_FTSR bit for line 1 is set.
Imapcted Registers: RCC_AHB1ENR, RCC_APB2ENR, GPIOA_MODER, SYSCFG_EXTICR1, EXTI_IMR, EXTI_FTSR
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: EXTI_FTSR & (1<<1) must be non-zero; otherwise fail.
Gap Analysis: No ISR or pending flag verification; mapping and mask set but no functional edge generation; hardcoded PA1/EXTI1.

Test Description: Enable rising-edge trigger on EXTI lines 0 through 7 and verify configuration.
Remarks: Assumes EXTI lines 0..7 are available and appropriately mapped on the platform.
Test Steps / Procedure: 1) Iterate EXTI lines 0..7. 2) Set EXTI_RTSR bit for each line. 3) Read back EXTI_RTSR for each line. 4) Verify each configured bit is set. 5) Declare pass when all bits are set.
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: For each i in 0..7, EXTI_RTSR & (1<<i) must be non-zero; otherwise fail.
Gap Analysis: Interrupt mask and GPIO-to-EXTI mapping not configured; no runtime edge stimulus to validate behavior; hardcoded line range.

Validation / Acceptance Criteria: For each pin in {0,2,4,6}, EXTI_RTSR & (1<<pin) must be non-zero; otherwise fail.
